Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-26 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's data shows two exceptional performers dominating the momentum-ranker, with MAMA leading at rank 1 (score 94.7) and ADTTF close behind. MAMA demonstrates textbook consistency across timeframes—posting 147% one-year returns while maintaining above all major moving averages (30/50/100/200 day), with ratio passes of 4 out of 5 and a stellar bad_spy_score of 2.13 indicating resilience during market downturns. ADTTF shows more explosive but choppier momentum, with a massive 278% one-year return and 40.58% weekly gain, though its ratio_passes of only 3 suggests less consistent scaling across timeframe transitions. Both tickers are significantly outpacing SPY and QQQ across all measured periods, with ADTTF's one-year outperformance against SPY reaching 258.21 percentage points. The data suggests a market environment rewarding sustained uptrends with clean technical positioning, though investors should note that ADTTF's more volatile ratio progression presents different risk characteristics than MAMA's smoother momentum profile.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
